business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Prior premium based on 2024 term with 0 claims.

positives: Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
Recent building system updates (Plumbing 2015, HVAC 2018, Electrical 2023)
concerns: No written contracts with all subcontractors
Building not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
Short-term rentals (less than 1 year) are permitted
Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) are not maintained
Lockout/tagout procedures are not in place
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Clean loss history with 0 claims reported for 2022, 2023, and 2024 prior terms.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. 24-hour security. No lockout/tagout procedures. MSDS not maintained.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Zero claims reported across Liberty Mutual, Hartford Financial Services, and Chubb Limited for the years 2022 to 2024.
